creator: peo@nethead.se
text:
Prevents mobile view from working. Manually adding it from the Horde git repository makes it work ok.

This is logged:

Aug 10 15:47:54 <local3.emerg> www3 HORDE: [imp] /usr/local/www/horde/js/horde-jquery-init.js does not exist or is not readable. [pid 33336 on line 37 of "/usr/local/share/pear/Horde/JavascriptMinify/Null.php"]
